x-enumeration-literals.name: ArrearsClosingBalance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The balance that is in arrears at the end of the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AvailableBalance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The available balance is the difference between the credit limit and the account balance – how much is available to spend.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AverageBalanceWhenInCredit
x-enumeration-literals.description: The average daily balance when the account is in credit during the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AverageBalanceWhenInDebit
x-enumeration-literals.description: The average daily balance when the account is in debit during the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AverageDailyBalance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The average daily balance during the statement period. An average daily balance adds the closing balances at the end of each day in a given period of time and divides the sum by the number of calendar days in that period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: BalanceTransferClosingBalance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The component of balance that relates to balance transfers at the end of the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CashClosingBalance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The component of balance that relates to cash at the end of the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ClosingBalance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The ending balance or closing balance at the end of the current statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CreditLimit
x-enumeration-literals.description: The credit limit is the total amount of credit available to a borrower, including any amount already borrowed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CurrentPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: The total payments received since the last period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DirectDebitPaymentDue
x-enumeration-literals.description: The total direct debit payments due for current statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FSCSInsurance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The amount under which the FSCS scheme will protect consumers when authorised financial services firms fail.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MinimumPaymentDue
x-enumeration-literals.description: The minimum payment required for the current statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PendingTransactionsBalance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The total pending transactions balance at the end of the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PreviousClosingBalance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The closing balance of the previous statement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PreviousPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: The previous payment amount in the last statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PurchaseClosingBalance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The component of balance that relates to purchases at the end of the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: StartingBalance
x-enumeration-literals.description: The new balance or starting balance carried forward since last statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TotalAdjustments
x-enumeration-literals.description: Total adjustments to the account during the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TotalCashAdvances
x-enumeration-literals.description: A cash advance is a short-term loan from a bank or alternative lender. The term also refers to a service provided by many credit card issuers allowing cardholders to withdraw a certain amount of cash.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TotalCharges
x-enumeration-literals.description: The total charges including interest, late payment fee during the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TotalCredits
x-enumeration-literals.description: Total amount credited in the account during the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TotalDebits
x-enumeration-literals.description: Total amount debited (money taken out from account) from the account during the statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TotalPurchases
x-enumeration-literals.description: The total transactions made during that statement period.
